# Miami Alliance 3PL

> Miami Alliance 3PL is a third-party logistics (3PL) and fulfillment company headquartered at 8780 NW 100th ST, Medley, FL 33178. We specialize in gaming and electronics fulfillment, e-commerce order fulfillment, Amazon FBA prep, warehousing, and Latin American distribution. No minimums, same-day shipping, 99.8% order accuracy. Phone: (786) 873-8819. Email: contact@miamialliance3pl.com

## Core Services

- [Warehousing & Fulfillment Services](https://miamialliance3pl.com/services.html): Full-service 3PL including receiving, warehousing, pick-pack-ship, inventory management, kitting, and import/export logistics from two warehouse locations.
- [Gaming & Electronics Fulfillment](https://miamialliance3pl.com/gaming-electronics-fulfillment.html): ESD-safe handling, serialized inventory tracking, climate-controlled storage for consoles (Nintendo, PlayStation, Xbox), video games, peripherals, and high-value consumer electronics.
- [Amazon FBA Prep Services](https://miamialliance3pl.com/amazon-fba-prep-miami.html): FNSKU labeling ($0.30/unit), poly bagging ($0.50/unit), bubble wrapping ($1.00/unit), bundling & kitting ($2.00/bundle), box content labeling ($3.00/box), inspection & QC ($0.15/unit).
- [Amazon 3PL Miami](https://miamialliance3pl.com/amazon-3pl-miami.html): Full Amazon seller support — FBA prep, FBM fulfillment, multi-channel fulfillment, and inventory management from Miami, FL.
- [Dropshipping Fulfillment](https://miamialliance3pl.com/dropshipping-fulfillment-miami.html): Blind shipping, branded packaging, no-minimum dropship fulfillment with same-day processing.
- [TikTok Shop Fulfillment](https://miamialliance3pl.com/tiktok-shop-fulfillment-miami.html): TikTok Shop integration, social commerce fulfillment, and influencer product shipping.
- [Wholesale & B2B Distribution](https://miamialliance3pl.com/wholesale-3pl.html): Wholesale fulfillment, case-pack distribution, retailer compliance, and B2B order processing.
- [Latin America Distribution](https://miamialliance3pl.com/latam-distribution-miami.html): Cross-border fulfillment to Latin America and Caribbean via Miami gateway — 8 miles from MIA, minutes from Port Miami.
- [Mercado Libre Fulfillment](https://miamialliance3pl.com/mercadolibre-fulfillment-miami.html): Ship from USA to Mercado Libre marketplaces across Latin America — product prep, labeling, and export documentation.
- [3PL for Brands](https://miamialliance3pl.com/3pl-for-brands.html): DTC and e-commerce brand fulfillment solutions with branded packaging and multi-channel support.
- [3PL for Factories & Manufacturers](https://miamialliance3pl.com/3pl-for-factories.html): Manufacturer distribution, warehousing, and B2B shipping services.
- [Instant Quote Calculator](https://miamialliance3pl.com/quote.html): Free online calculator for storage and fulfillment pricing — get a custom 3PL plan in 24 hours.

## Pricing

- Storage (Box): $0.025 per cubic foot per day
- Storage (Pallet): $0.75 per pallet per day
- Pick & Pack (Envelope): $1.50/order
- Pick & Pack (Small Box): $3.00/order
- Pick & Pack (Medium Box): $5.00/order
- Pick & Pack (Large Box): $20.00/order
- Black Wrapping: $7.00/pallet
- Receiving & Intake: $15.00/pallet
- Local Pickup/Delivery: Starting at $120 for 1 pallet
- No minimum orders. No long-term contracts. Pay only for what you use.

## Warehouse Locations

### Miami Warehouse (Primary)
- Address: 8780 NW 100th ST, Medley, FL 33178
- Size: 20,000+ sq ft climate-controlled
- Hours: Monday-Friday 8AM-6PM, Saturday 9AM-2PM
- Features: ESD-safe zones, 24/7 security, serialized tracking
- Proximity: 8 miles from Miami International Airport, 15 minutes from Port Miami

### Biloxi Warehouse (Gulf Coast Hub)
- Address: 1606 Beach Blvd, Biloxi, MS 39531
- Features: Cost-effective Southeast U.S. distribution, I-10 access, near Port of Gulfport

## Company Information

- [About Us](https://miamialliance3pl.com/about.html): Company background, team, warehouse capabilities, and mission.
- [FAQ](https://miamialliance3pl.com/faq.html): 20+ answers to common questions about 3PL services, pricing, onboarding, shipping, FBA prep, and operations.
- [Contact](https://miamialliance3pl.com/contact.html): Phone (786) 873-8819, email contact@miamialliance3pl.com, quote request form.
- [Customer Portal](https://miamialliance3pl.com/login.html): Real-time inventory tracking, shipment management, billing, and reporting dashboard.

## Key Facts

- Order accuracy: 99.8%
- Same-day shipping for orders received by 2PM EST
- 80% of U.S. customers reached within 2 business days via ground
- No minimum order requirements
- No long-term contracts
- Bilingual team (English and Spanish)
- Aggregate rating: 4.9/5 stars (47 reviews)
- Integrations: Shopify, Amazon, WooCommerce, eBay, TikTok Shop, Mercado Libre
- Specialization: Gaming & electronics, consumer goods, supplements, beauty, apparel

## Blog & Industry Insights

- [3PL & Logistics Blog](https://miamialliance3pl.com/blog.html): 100+ articles on e-commerce fulfillment, tariff impacts, Mercado Libre selling guides, Amazon FBA strategies, supply chain trends, and 3PL best practices.
